ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "species" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the animal */,
  "bought_date" TEXT /* Date the animal was acquired */,
  "sold_date" TEXT /* Date the animal was adopted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animal */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the animal */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the animal is located */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Typical diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the medical procedure */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Description of the procedure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the procedure */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the veterinarian who performed the procedure */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the medical procedure */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up appointments are needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who conducted the assessment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Behavioral score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assessment */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_assessments_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption application */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the application */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for adoption */,
  "home_visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the home visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_applications_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the staff member works */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer started volunteering */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the volunteer works */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the volunteer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the volunteer */,
  "hours_committed" INTEGER /* Number of hours committed by the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supply */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the supply */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Last date when the supply was stocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the donation was received */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation */,
  "donation_description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "donation_history" TEXT /* Donation history of the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the adoption */,
  "fee" REAL /* Adoption fee */,
  "adoption_type" TEXT /* Type of adoption */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up after adoption */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the adoption took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_adopter_id FOREIGN KEY ("adopter_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adopters" (
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adopter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the adopter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adopter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the adopter */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the adopter's family */,
  "pet_history" TEXT /* Pet history of the adopter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelters" (
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shelter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the shelter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the shelter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the shelter */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shelter where the user works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_shelter_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelter_id") REFERENCES shelters ("shelter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
